message:
fix(test): update extension scoring integration test expectations for continuous scoring

Adjust expected score values in scoring_examples_match_rubric() after
the switch from discrete tier scoring to continuous log-linear/exponential
functions:

- openclaw: adoption 12→13 (log-linear npm/marketplace rounding change),
  activity 15→14 (exponential decay gives 14 for ~16 days old)
- niche-github-script: total 26→30 (continuous scoring assigns partial
  credit where discrete tiers gave 0)
- official-pi-mono-example: total 69→68 (exponential activity decay
  slightly reduces score for moderate-age entries)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
